title: osmitopsis glabra
intro: Osmitopsis glabra, also known as the smooth leaved osmitopsis, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Osmitopsis glabra include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Osmitopsis glabra include tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
